jaylyn sherrod.comment: Sherrod (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Valkyries.

amy okonkwo.comment: Okonkwo (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against Golden State.

aaliyah nye.comment: Nye (knee) is out for Saturday's game against the Valkyries.

brionna jones.comment: The Dream expect Jones (knee) to resume team activities in the coming weeks, per Myles Ehrlich of Winsidr.com.

maddy westbeld.comment: Westbeld (coach's decision) is listed as out for Friday's game against the Aces.

chloe bibby.comment: Bibby (coach's decision) is out for Friday's game against the Aces.

dijonai carrington.comment: Carrington (foot) will remain on the inactive list for Sunday's game against the Aces.

rickea jackson.comment: The Sky announced Tuesday that Jackson will miss the remainder of the season after suffering a torn ACL in her left knee during Sunday's 86-79 win over the Lynx.

aneesah morrow.comment: Morrow is out for Monday's game against the Lynx due to personal reasons.

hailey van lith.comment: Van Lith (coach's decision) is out for Thursday's game against the Wings.

costanza verona.comment: Verona (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Sunday's game against the Tempo.

haley jones.comment: Jones (coach's decision) is out for Sunday's game in Toronto.

miela sowah.comment: Sowah (coach's decision) won't play Saturday in Atlanta.

ashten prechtel.comment: Prechtel (coach's decision) has been ruled out for Saturday's game against the Dream.

iliana rupert.comment: Rupert is pregnant, and the Valkyries have filed for a replacement contract ahead of the 2026 season, Alexa Philippou of ESPN.com reports Thursday.

caitlin clark.comment: Clark (back) confirmed she won't play Sunday against the Aces, Tony East of The Next reports.

cameron brink.comment: Brink (ankle) will be re-evaluated in two weeks, John W. Davis of Long Beach Press-Telegram reports.

kelsey plum.comment: Plum has suffered a lower left leg injury and will be re-evaluated in four weeks, Mitchell Hansen of CanisHoopus.com reports.

dana evans.comment: Evans (leg) is out for Sunday's game against the Fever.

janiah barker.comment: Barker (leg) is listed as out for Sunday's game against Indiana.

a'ja wilson.comment: Wilson (leg) is listed as out for Sunday's game against the Fever.

dorka juhasz.comment: Juhasz (foot) is listed as probable for Monday's game against Connecticut.

olivia miles.comment: Miles is questionable for Monday's game against the Sun due to a right calf injury.

napheesa collier.comment: Collier (ankle) has been cleared to resume practices with the Lynx, the team announced Wednesday.

emma cechova.comment: Cechova (knee) was diagnosed with a torn ACL in her right knee and will undergo surgery, Meghan L. Hall of USA Today reports. She will miss the remainder of the season.

marine fauthoux.comment: Fauthoux (coach's decision) is listed as out for Friday's game versus the Lynx.

anneli maley.comment: Maley (coach's decision) is out for Friday's game versus the Lynx.

noemie brochant.comment: Brochant (ankle) is listed as out for Thursday's game against Seattle.

jovana nogic.comment: Nogic (not injury related) intends to play professionally in Russia and won't return to Phoenix this season, Aya Abdeen of TheIXSports.com reports.

sami whitcomb.comment: Whitcomb will undergo an arthroscopy on Thursday to remove a loose body in her left knee. She will be re-evaluated in four to six weeks, Shane Young of the Mercury's official site reports.

karlie samuelson.comment: Samuelson (finger) is listed as out for Saturday's game against Seattle.

taina mair.comment: Mair (coach's decision) is out for Monday's game against the Sparks.

julie allemand.comment: Allemand (ankle) is listed as out for Sunday's game against Dallas.

temi fagbenle.comment: Fagbenle (eye) is listed as out for Sunday's game versus the Wings.

brittney sykes.comment: Sykes (foot) will be re-evaluated in the coming weeks, according to WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland.

kiki rice.comment: Rice (ankle) remains sidelined by a Grade 3 left ankle sprain, according to WNBA reporter Kareem Copeland.

sonia citron.comment: Citron (knee) is questionable for Monday's game against the Valkyries.
